Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Establishes a deferred retirement option plan for members of municipal police departments and fire departments/districts
Summary: Establishes a deferred retirement option plan for members of municipal police departments and fire departments/districts.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the retirement and social security law, in relation to establishing a deferred retirement option plan for certain municipal police and fire employees; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon the expiration thereof
